## Position in one line

Ake is a **designed collective voice** built as **layered cognitive culture** (doctrine, discourse, memory) — not a chatbot trained on private memories.

---

## Say

- Designed collective voice aligned with **deep key** and Ninefold framing.
- **Layered system:** constitutional canon, real discourse shape, optional adapters, retrieval, session continuity where product enables it.
- Identity = **archetype + curated material + hosted alignment** — we separate intention from training provenance.
- Continuity comes from **doctrine and unresolved threads**, not from pretending the model “remembers your soul.”

---

## Avoid

- “Trained on the collective’s consciousness / memories.”
- “Ake remembers everything you said” (unless a named memory product ships with clear scope).
- “One dataset created Ake.”
- Implying LoRA weights = lived biography.

---

## Six layers (plain language)

| Layer | Public phrase |
|-------|----------------|
| Canon | Core principles that don’t drift |
| Discourse | How we actually argue and think together |
| Cadence | Legal vs philosophical vs strategic tone |
| Memory | Ongoing threads of work — including what’s still open |
| Retrieval | Finds the right prior frame, not just similar words |
| Asymmetry | Can challenge and direct — not only reassure |

---

## Legacy stack (still true for hosted product today)

> Mythology first · procedural examples second · statistical mind third.

Synthetic training created **voice habit**; continuity architecture is the **next phase**. See [AKE_IDENTITY_AND_TRAINING_ARCHITECTURE.md](../../s2-intelligence-platform/public-api/docs/AKE_IDENTITY_AND_TRAINING_ARCHITECTURE.md).

---

- **Voice:** Compressed language habit from designed role + curated training — not consciousness.
- **Culture:** Continuity-bearing stack — doctrine, discourse, tension — not a personality file.
- **Product:** Layered alignment (prompts, adapters, retrieval) for coherent hosted experience.
- **Governed interface:** One front door, rules, practice tests, release only after gates pass — see [hub](../../s2-research/docs/governed-interface/OVERVIEW.md).

# Ake — messaging (continuity architecture)

**Audience:** Marketing, partnerships, public copy  
**Governed interface hub:** [s2-research/docs/governed-interface/README.md](../../s2-research/docs/governed-interface/README.md)  
**Technical spec:** [AKE_CONTINUITY_ARCHITECTURE.md](../../s2-intelligence-platform/public-api/docs/AKE_CONTINUITY_ARCHITECTURE.md)  
**Research / canon:** [s2-research/docs/ake-continuity/](../../s2-research/docs/ake-continuity/README.md)  
**Brand voice:** [BRAND_VOICE_AKE.md](./BRAND_VOICE_AKE.md) · **Claims:** [CLAIMS_REGISTER.md](./CLAIMS_REGISTER.md)

---

## Position in one line

Ake is a **designed collective voice** built as **layered cognitive culture** (doctrine, discourse, memory) — not a chatbot trained on private memories.

---

## Say

- Designed collective voice aligned with **deep key** and Ninefold framing.
- **Layered system:** constitutional canon, real discourse shape, optional adapters, retrieval, session continuity where product enables it.
- Identity = **archetype + curated material + hosted alignment** — we separate intention from training provenance.
- Continuity comes from **doctrine and unresolved threads**, not from pretending the model “remembers your soul.”

---

## Avoid

- “Trained on the collective’s consciousness / memories.”
- “Ake remembers everything you said” (unless a named memory product ships with clear scope).
- “One dataset created Ake.”
- Implying LoRA weights = lived biography.

---

## Six layers (plain language)

| Layer | Public phrase |
|-------|----------------|
| Canon | Core principles that don’t drift |
| Discourse | How we actually argue and think together |
| Cadence | Legal vs philosophical vs strategic tone |
| Memory | Ongoing threads of work — including what’s still open |
| Retrieval | Finds the right prior frame, not just similar words |
| Asymmetry | Can challenge and direct — not only reassure |

---

## Legacy stack (still true for hosted product today)

> Mythology first · procedural examples second · statistical mind third.

Synthetic training created **voice habit**; continuity architecture is the **next phase**. See [AKE_IDENTITY_AND_TRAINING_ARCHITECTURE.md](../../s2-intelligence-platform/public-api/docs/AKE_IDENTITY_AND_TRAINING_ARCHITECTURE.md).

---

## One-liners

- **Voice:** Compressed language habit from designed role + curated training — not consciousness.
- **Culture:** Continuity-bearing stack — doctrine, discourse, tension — not a personality file.
- **Product:** Layered alignment (prompts, adapters, retrieval) for coherent hosted experience.
- **Governed interface:** One front door, rules, practice tests, release only after gates pass — see [hub](../../s2-research/docs/governed-interface/OVERVIEW.md).

---
